authority: research only; no registry, paper, shadow, funding, broker, arm, or live authority
candidate_or_family_scope: fixed present-day liquid operating-company panel from current rank; explicit BMO/AMC timestamp; absolute first completed-session reaction >=2%; prior same-symbol same-sign non-event matched control
capital_basis: structural $2-width one-lot maximum debit before closing friction; not observed or simulated loss
claim_scope: underlying-only split/dividend-adjusted closes and retrospectively downloaded explicit earnings timestamps. No open-price execution, option marks, bid/ask costs, IV crush, debit-spread fills, or managed option PnL were measured. The present-day panel has survivorship/listing bias. L0 train-only discovery cannot grant L1, a capital seat, or paper eligibility.

AAPL.timing_semantics: Yahoo Finance retrospective earnings timestamp converted to UTC

AMD.timing_semantics: Yahoo Finance retrospective earnings timestamp converted to UTC

ARM.timing_semantics: Yahoo Finance retrospective earnings timestamp converted to UTC

GOOGL.timing_semantics: Yahoo Finance retrospective earnings timestamp converted to UTC

SMCI.timing_semantics: Yahoo Finance retrospective earnings timestamp converted to UTC

TSLA.timing_semantics: Yahoo Finance retrospective earnings timestamp converted to UTC

panel.join: outer union by session; leading/trailing listing gaps only; each symbol evaluated on own history

data_provenance.selection_source: research.db run 36 current full-universe rank; eight liquid operating-company names frozen before outcomes

dominant_failure_mechanism: frozen train gate failed: event_signed_mean_above_control, positive_paired_signed_excess_mean, paired_signed_excess_bootstrap_lb90_positive, continuation_hit_rate_edge_gte_5pct
economic_mechanism: earnings resolve concentrated information uncertainty; gradual interpretation and investor underreaction may continue the signed first completed post-announcement move over five sessions
entry_trigger: future option plan: after the first fully completed post-announcement regular session, enter at the next regular-session open in the completed reaction direction; current mechanism outcome is measured from signal close through five sessions and is not an execution simulation
exit_rule: underlying mechanism horizon is five completed sessions; no option exit was simulated
falsifier: train has fewer than 40 matched pairs or 6 symbols; paired signed five-session excess mean or one-sided 90% five-pair circular-block-bootstrap lower bound is non-positive; continuation hit-rate edge is below five percentage points; or integrity fails

greek_exposures.dangerous_unintended: long vega into post-event IV crush, long gamma/theta decay, gap risk, and sparse two-leg liquidity

horizon_alignment: five-session signed close continuation is directionally aligned with a later 21-DTE call/put debit spread but does not establish next-open fill quality, theta/vega economics, or after-cost option edge
management_rule: untested future option plan only: 50% debit-spread profit harvest, completed-session reversal stop through signal-session opposite extreme, hard five-session time stop, no roll or same-bar re-entry
mispricing_claim: none yet; the wake tests an underlying information-underreaction mechanism
option_structure: conditional 21-DTE $2-wide call debit spread after positive reactions and $2-wide put debit spread after negative reactions; not priced in this wake

population_validity.population_pure_semantics: the frozen ordered panel is complete; purity does not mean bias-free
population_validity.population_type: fixed present-day liquid operating-company panel from research rank 36

portfolio_overlap_rule: one global earnings-risk unit; no overlapping event windows
regime_hypothesis: issuer earnings with an explicit timing label and absolute first completed-session move >=2%; stand aside on ambiguous timing, weak reaction, missing history, overlap, or failed gate
stand_aside_rule: missing or ambiguous timing, reaction below threshold, unavailable exact history, overlapping event window, non-finite feature, failed train gate, exact package max loss above $300, or another event-risk unit open
